name: Worker
comment:
Start Elm applications without a view

@docs workerWithFlags, worker, beginnerWorker

values.name: beginnerWorker
values.comment: Start a worker program with just a model a simpler update function
values.type: (model -> Cmd msg) -> { model : model, update : msg -> model -> model } -> Program Never

values.name: worker
values.type: (model -> Cmd msg) -> { init : ( model, Cmd msg ), update : msg -> model -> ( model, Cmd msg ), subscriptions : model -> Sub msg } -> Program Never

values.name: workerWithFlags
values.type: (model -> Cmd msg) -> { init : flags -> ( model, Cmd msg ), update : msg -> model -> ( model, Cmd msg ), subscriptions : model -> Sub msg } -> Program flags
